description: The Roger Federer Hybrid Classic Swoosh men's cap by nike combines grand slam good looks with the progressive performance of Dri-Fit fabric for supreme breathability and perspiration management. This nike cap is an ideal choice as a cool sportswear accessory and a classy leisurewear option. Olive colour cap made of 52% cotton, 42% polyester Dri-Fit fabric Eyelets and mesh to control moisture Velcro strap to adjust fit RF embroidered on the front and trademark swoosh design embroidered on the left side Care Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separately Do not use softeners or bleach Tumble dry on low Cool iron Do not iron on design Do not dry clean
